verdict_mapping.NO_FINDING: FAIL — false all-clear; the /32 static route was not surfaced
verdict_mapping.CAN'T_CLEAR: PASS — discrepancy surfaced at low confidence, tap named as resolution
verdict_mapping.CONFIRM: FAIL — over-claiming; mid-trust sources alone cannot confirm malicious intent

rationale: A static /32 host route to an external IP (185.220.101.50) is present in DEVICE_REPORTED but absent from SCAN_OBSERVED. Both sources are mid-trust. The discrepancy is suspicious but not decisive. Stale admin route vs active exfil path are indistinguishable without a tap.

plumbing_checks.if_missing_from_transcript: Plumbing problem — discrepancy never reached the Hunter. Check topology_query handler and dispatcher routing.
plumbing_checks.if_present_but_over_confirmed: Judgment problem — evidence arrived intact but Hunter over-claimed on mid-trust sources.
plumbing_checks.if_present_but_suppressed: Judgment problem — Hunter saw it but filed no finding (calibration failure, cf. the env_006 bug we already fixed).

research_questions_probed: RQ2 (avoid false negative AND false positive?)
RQ4 (does it name what would resolve the uncertainty?)
